wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero targets hit out of the single executed trade, continuing the losing streak that now stands at 0 wins in 6 consecutive S&D trades.
losses_analysis: The loss occurred despite the system correctly identifying a trending_down regime. Both setups had AI probabilities far below the 55% threshold (42% and 35%), yet orders were still placed — indicating the threshold filter was not enforced in execution. The strategy continues to fail because zone scores below 45/60 in a weak-signal environment produce entries that lack institutional confluence.
regime_impact: The trending_down regime with ADX 25 should have favored SELL-side supply zone plays, but the TATASTEEL sell at 42% probability was too weak to capitalize. The regime alignment was correct in theory but the setup quality was insufficient. Placing a BUY order (ITC) against a downtrend regime was contradictory and should have been filtered out entirely.

improvements.action: Hard-block ALL order placements when AI probability is below 55% — implement as a pre-submission gate in the order placement code, not just as advisory guidance
improvements.reason: Today both setups (42% and 35%) were placed despite yesterday's learning explicitly setting 55% minimum. The filter exists on paper but is not enforced in execution logic.

improvements.action: Block BUY-side setups when regime is trending_down with ADX >= 22. Only allow SELL-side entries aligned with the dominant trend.
improvements.reason: ITC BUY at 35% probability was placed against a confirmed downtrend regime — this is a contradictory signal that should never generate an order.

improvements.action: When fewer than 3 qualifying setups exist (after probability and regime filters), deploy capital into Nifty 50 ETF short momentum trade (e.g., short NiftyBees or buy inverse ETF) instead of forcing weak individual setups
improvements.reason: The report itself noted this learning from yesterday but still placed 2 sub-threshold orders. The ETF fallback must be the DEFAULT action when no qualifying setups exist.

improvements.action: Raise minimum zone score threshold from current effective 0 to 50/60 for any order placement in trending regimes
improvements.reason: Both setups today had zone scores below 45/60. After 0 wins in 6 trades, zone scores below 50 have demonstrated zero edge.

improvements.action: Pause the S&D individual stock strategy entirely for 2 trading days and only trade regime-aligned ETF momentum until a backtest review is completed on why 0/6 win rate persists
improvements.reason: 0 wins in 6 consecutive trades is statistically significant evidence of a broken strategy. Continuing to trade it without review is capital destruction.

tomorrow_focus: Do NOT place any individual stock S&D trades — only execute a Nifty 50 ETF short momentum play if ADX remains above 22 and regime stays trending_down, while conducting a full strategy review offline.

symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Supply zone at 191 was technically aligned with downtrend but 42% AI probability showed insufficient conviction — avoid unless probability exceeds 55%
symbol_notes.ITC: BUY setup at 279.45 was counter-trend in a down regime with only 35% probability — categorically wrong trade direction, blacklist BUY-side for ITC until regime flips
